prefix.label: Plugin Prefix
prefix.description: The unique plugin prefix. This will be used to identify your plugin in Perfex. It should be unique and should not contain any special characters or spaces.

version.label: Plugin Version
version.description: The version of the plugin. This will be displayed in the Perfex admin panel.

name.label: Plugin Name
name.description: The name of the plugin. This will be displayed in the Perfex admin panel.

desc.label: Plugin Description
desc.description: A short description of the plugin. This will be displayed in the Perfex admin panel.

author.label: Author Name
author.description: Your name or the name of your company. This will be displayed in the Perfex admin panel.

author_uri.label: Author URL
author_uri.description: The URL of your website. This will be displayed in the Perfex admin panel.
